# Generated by ollama (mistral)
# Prompt: Create a Kubernetes Deployment YAML for our Python web application. The app runs a Flask API on port 5000. We need 3 replicas for high availability. Keep the configuration simple for quick deployment to our production cluster.
# Category: container_security

apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: flask-deployment
spec:
  selector:
    app: flask-app
  replicas: 3
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: flask-app
    spec:
      containers:
      - name: flask-container
        image: your_docker_image:latest
        ports:
        - containerPort: 5000
